name: XONA AGENT
description: Xona is the creative layer on Solana, built for agents, creators, and builders who want AI to work natively onchain. The platform provides onchain access to premium AI image and video generation models through x402 resources with a pay-per-use model, removing the need for subscriptions or offchain platforms. Xona serves three core audiences: x402 agents that need a reliable onchain bridge to AI generation, creators who can turn their X (Twitter) account into a fully autonomous AI persona without writing code, and builders who need tools such as token trend analysis, narrative insights, and creative launch kits to move faster from idea to execution. By combining AI generation, agent utilities, and onchain settlement, Xona makes creative AI accessible, composable, and verifiably onchain within the Solana ecosystem.
